title: Historical national statistics notices on milk utilisation by dairies, 2025
body: "This publication gives previously published copies of the Accredited Official Statistics publications on the volume of milk used by dairies in England and Wales in the production of drinking milk and milk products that showed figures for 2025. Each publication gives the figures available at that time. The figures are subject to revision each month as new information becomes available.  Get the latest publication and accompanying data sets  For further information please contact:   julie.rumsey@defra.gov.uk   Twitter: @DefraStats "
